category_sources: Official SANE download page says sane-backends includes scanner drivers, scanimage, saned, and SANE API documentation.
display_name_sources: Official SANE site refers to the component as sane-backends.
docs_sources: Official SANE documentation page and official manual-page directory are dedicated documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: Official SANE git access page lists https://gitlab.com/sane-project/backends.git as the anonymous Git repository for sane-backends.
tags_sources: Official SANE download page describes scanner drivers and network scanning daemon contents.
source_facts.executables lists scanimage, saned, sane-find-scanner, and sane-config.
